# Arc Psychotherapy

Arc Psychotherapy is a private-pay psychotherapy practice based in Downtown Round Rock, Texas, serving adults navigating perfectionism, rigidity (overcontrol), and religious harm (spiritual trauma).

Primary content hubs:
- /start-here
- /perfectionism
- /overcontrol
- /religious-harm
- /frameworks
- /ideas
- /work-with-me

Core themes:
- Structured psychotherapy
- The Adjacent Possible
- Perfectionism as structure
- Moral injury in helping professions
- Religious harm and meaning reconstruction

Primary population:
High-achieving adults who function well externally but experience internal rigidity or shame.

Author:
Leila Anderson, LMFT-S

Tone:
Intellectually precise, structured, systems-aware.
